Red_Team.description: Injects fuzzy, out-of-spec, or corrupted data payloads into bioreactor telemetry or analytical scanner logs.

Blue_Team.description: Monitors inputs, applies strict cGMP rules, catches deviations, and raises cGMP fault codes.

Green_Team.description: Orchestrates sandbox execution, logs agent trajectories, tracks path efficiency, and triggers circuit breakers.

steps: Red Team generates and writes test payload
Blue Team parses and validates payload against CQA baselines
Blue Team throws specific cGMP fault codes if out-of-spec
Green Team logs trajectory score and verifies integrity
